name: ololand-dd
description: Institutional underwriting layer inside Claude. 39 MCP tools: deterministic DCF / LBO / Monte Carlo / real options engines, 246-category risk taxonomy, forensic QoE (Beneish, Benford, EBITDA bridge, lapping), cross-document reconciliation with source hierarchy, war-game RL simulation, and cross-deal learning against your firm's closed deals.
